title: review-issue-breakdown-by-schedule
description: Schema for the Review — Issue Breakdown by Schedule widget. Three narratable sections: (1) per-schedule resolution mix (spot/direct/open), (2) resolution trend across schedules (pre-computed deltas), (3) risk severity resolution — ZT+High unresolved per schedule.

count.description: Absolute issue count for this resolution type

percent.description: This bucket as % of schedule totalIssues; rounded to 1 decimal

isCurrent.description: true if this is the current schedule

resolvedPercent.description: Combined spot + direct as % of totalIssues (pre-computed); rounded to 1 decimal

totalUnresolved.description: Total unresolved issues (open issues) for this schedule

ztUnresolved.description: Unresolved Zero Tolerance issues in this schedule

highUnresolved.description: Unresolved High risk issues in this schedule

ztAndHighUnresolvedPercent.description: ztAndHighUnresolved as % of totalUnresolved; rounded to 1 decimal

scheduleCount.description: Number of schedules in scope (current + up to previous 3)

totalIssuesAllSchedules.description: Grand total issues across all schedules in scope

perScheduleResolution.description: Per-schedule resolution mix: spot resolution, direct resolution, open issues for each schedule. Array ordered oldest→current.

schedules.description: Schedules ordered from oldest (index 0) to current (last index). Each entry has full resolution breakdown.

resolutionTrend.description: Pre-computed percentage-point changes from oldest schedule to current schedule. Positive = increase, negative = decrease.

fromScheduleId.description: Schedule ID of the oldest (baseline) schedule

toScheduleId.description: Schedule ID of the current schedule

spotResolutionPpChange.description: Change in spotResolution % from oldest to current (percentage points, 1 decimal). Negative = declined.

directResolutionPpChange.description: Change in directResolution % from oldest to current (percentage points, 1 decimal).

openIssuesPpChange.description: Change in openIssues % from oldest to current (percentage points, 1 decimal). Positive = more unresolved.

resolvedHealthPpChange.description: Change in resolvedPercent from oldest to current (percentage points, 1 decimal). Negative = health declined.

riskSeverityResolution.description: ZT + High risk unresolved issue breakdown per schedule. Ordered same as perScheduleResolution (oldest→current).
